title: Savage Seerat: Kid Actress Outsmarts the Host
description: Young actress Seerat joins the podcast to share her inspiring journey in the entertainment industry. Discover how this talented kid navigates the challenges of showbiz while maintaining her childhood. A candid conversation about balancing studies, acting, and growing up in the spotlight.

title: Vikram: Entrepreneur & Tech Investor Shares Business Insights
description: Tech entrepreneur Vikram reveals insider secrets about building successful businesses, Airbnb experiences, and navigating the digital economy. He discusses his journey from startup to scaling operations, along with lessons learned from failures. A must-listen for aspiring entrepreneurs and business enthusiasts.

title: Mindset of Rich People: Buy, Borrow, Die Strategy
description: Uncover the secret wealth-building strategies of the rich. Learn about the 'Buy, Borrow, Die' strategy that wealthy individuals use to multiply their assets. This episode breaks down financial concepts that separate the rich from the poor and how you can apply them to your life.

title: The Science of Manifestation: Attract Success
description: Discover the psychology and science behind manifestation. Learn practical techniques to attract success, abundance, and prosperity into your life. This episode explores whether manifestation works, the laws of attraction, and real-world success stories from our community.

title: Software Engineer Job in Doha: Salary & Lifestyle
description: Join us as a software engineer working in Doha shares the reality of tech jobs in the Middle East. Explore salary packages, cost of living, work culture, and lifestyle in Doha. Perfect for professionals considering international opportunities in the Gulf region.

title: IT Evolution & Job Hunting in 2025
description: The IT industry is rapidly evolving. Learn what skills are in demand, how to land your dream tech job in 2025, and what the future holds for developers and IT professionals. Expert insights on upskilling, certifications, and market trends.

title: Anshul Bansal: Real Estate Investment - Punjab to Dubai
description: Real estate mogul Anshul Bansal discusses his investment journey from Punjab to Dubai. Learn about property investment strategies, identifying profitable deals, market analysis, and building a real estate empire. Essential wisdom for investors and entrepreneurs.

title: Gurinder Gauri: Mrs. Chandigarh - Education & Social Work
description: Meet Mrs. Chandigarh, Gurinder Gauri, as she shares her inspiring journey in education and social work. Discover how she's making a difference in the community through various initiatives and what motivates her to serve society.

title: Sheena Dhawan: Life in Delhi vs. Mohali & AI Impact
description: Tech professional Sheena compares life in Delhi versus Mohali and discusses how artificial intelligence is transforming our world. Insightful perspectives on urban living, career opportunities, and the future of AI technology.

title: Brutal Crime Confessions: Punjab Police Secrets
description: An insider from Punjab Police shares shocking crime confessions and real cases from the field. A gripping conversation about law enforcement, criminal psychology, and the dark realities that police officers face. Mature content warning.

title: Gurjeet Mattaur: Punjabi Singers & Music Industry Secrets
description: Gurjeet discusses the Punjabi music industry, shares stories of famous singers, and reveals behind-the-scenes secrets. A must-listen for music lovers and aspiring artists wanting to understand the industry better.

title: Akash: From E-Commerce Hustle to Smart Farming
description: Entrepreneur Akash shares his fascinating journey from running an e-commerce business to venturing into smart farming. Learn about the pivot, challenges, innovations, and how technology is revolutionizing agriculture.

title: Satwinder Singh: News Channel Sales to Digital Empire
description: Satwinder's remarkable journey from working in news channels to building a digital empire. Discover his strategies for digital marketing, content creation, and scaling online businesses. Inspiration for digital entrepreneurs.

title: Dr. Parvinder Kaur: Balancing Family, Passion & Profession
description: Dr. Parvinder Kaur shares her inspiring story of balancing a medical career, family responsibilities, and personal passions. A thoughtful conversation about women in medicine, work-life balance, and pursuing dreams.

title: Jobanjeet Singh: Journey of a Coder
description: Software developer Jobanjeet shares his coding journey, from learning programming to landing his dream job. Valuable insights for aspiring developers, tips on building a portfolio, and the future of coding.

title: Manish Shahi: Faith or Fraud - Astrology Myths
description: Is astrology science or superstition? Manish Shahi explores common astrology myths, separates facts from fiction, and discusses the role of belief systems in our lives. A balanced perspective on spirituality and rationality.

title: Passion Ya Paisa: Dark Reality of Music Industry
description: Following passion vs. making money in the music industry. This episode reveals the harsh realities aspiring musicians face, including exploitation, payment issues, and how to navigate the industry smartly.

title: Ms. Navneet Sharma: Teacher to Trailblazer
description: From classroom teacher to social change-maker, Navneet's journey is inspiring. Learn about her transition, the challenges faced, and her mission to transform education and society in Punjab.

title: Kamal Jeet Singh: From College to Career in Bhangra
description: Bhangra artist Kamal Jeet shares his journey from college days to becoming a professional performer. Stories from the dance world, cultural significance of bhangra, and advice for aspiring artists.

title: Rajvinder Singh: Corporate to Cab Driver Journey
description: A remarkable story of leaving corporate life to become a cab driver. Rajvinder discusses his reasons, lessons learned, and finding fulfillment in a different path. A thought-provoking perspective on career choices.

title: Election Strategy: Winning Punjab, Haryana & Himachal
description: A political expert shares insights into election campaigns and winning strategies in Punjab, Haryana, and Himachal Pradesh. Learn about campaign management, voter psychology, and political analysis.

title: Harsimarpreet Singh: Baker to Rental Car Business
description: Harsimarpreet's journey from running a baking business to venturing into the car rental industry. Learn about diversification, business scaling, and taking calculated risks.

title: Gurjeet Kamboj: From Faculty to Founder
description: Gurjeet left his teaching career to start his own venture. Discover his entrepreneurial journey, challenges of starting a business, and balancing multiple roles.

title: Jarman Sheikh: From Subway to Singing Journey
description: Jarman Sheikh shares his incredible journey from working in Subway to becoming a successful singer. A story of passion, perseverance, and pursuing dreams against all odds.

title: Food Delivery Struggles: Chandigarh University Ghost Story
description: A unique episode combining food delivery business struggles with an intriguing ghost story from Chandigarh University. Entertainment mixed with real business challenges and supernatural tales.

title: Bharat Kaushal: Mr. North India
description: Meet Bharat Kaushal, known as Mr. North India. Learn about his fitness journey, championship wins, lifestyle, and how he became a prominent figure in the bodybuilding and fitness community.

title: Mr. Bhatia's Insane Rise: From Cold Calls to Boardrooms
description: Mr. Bhatia reveals his extraordinary rise from making cold calls to sitting in boardrooms. A master class in sales, negotiation, and business acumen. Perfect for aspiring entrepreneurs and sales professionals.

title: Mr. Raman Sharma: Hotel Industry Secrets
description: Raman Sharma shares inside secrets of the hotel and hospitality industry. Learn about operations, customer service, challenges, and what goes on behind the scenes in luxury and budget hotels.

title: Dr. Navneet Sharma: Farmer Protest & Adani Secrets
description: Dr. Navneet Sharma discusses the farmer protests, reveals secrets about agricultural policies, and explores the Adani controversy. A deep dive into agricultural issues, farmer rights, and political implications.
